summary: Verified Provider Profile unification for Doula and Midwife roles. All profile screens load correctly with role-specific fields, colors, and icons. 5 shared components serving 10 provider screens (53% line reduction achieved).
critical_code_review_comments: Thin wrapper pattern correctly implemented - profile.tsx files are only 7 lines each
ProviderProfile component correctly handles role-specific fields
Doula profile shows: Zip Code field, heart icon, lavender (#9F83B6) badge color
Midwife profile shows: Credentials field, medkit icon, green (#8CAF8C) badge color
Config-driven approach working well with DOULA_CONFIG and MIDWIFE_CONFIG
53% line reduction achieved (~6,765 → ~3,180 lines) as noted in request
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 provider screens (Dashboard, Clients, Messages, Invoices, Profile) are now unified using shared components. Direct URL navigation recommended for testing as bottom nav clicks may not update URL on web. Profile unification complete with role-specific fields working correctly.
flows_verified: ✓ Doula Profile - All 4 sections: Practice Information, Video Introduction, More About Me, Subscription
✓ Doula Profile - Role badge with lavender color (#9F83B6) and heart icon
✓ Doula Profile - Edit mode shows Zip Code field (Doula-specific)
✓ Doula Profile - Credentials field NOT shown (correct)
✓ Doula - All 5 tabs work: Dashboard, Clients, Messages, Invoices, Profile
✓ Midwife Profile - All 4 sections: Practice Information, Video Introduction, More About Me, Subscription
✓ Midwife Profile - Role badge with green color (#8CAF8C) and medkit icon
✓ Midwife Profile - View mode shows Credentials field with value 'CPM' (Midwife-specific)
✓ Midwife Profile - Edit mode shows Credentials input field
✓ Midwife Profile - Zip Code field NOT shown (correct - Doula-specific)
✓ Midwife - All 5 tabs work: Dashboard, Clients, Messages, Invoices, Profile

ProviderProfile.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender theme, heart icon, Zip Code field in edit mode, no Credentials
ProviderProfile.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green theme, medkit (stethoscope) icon, Credentials field, no Zip Code

thin_wrapper_verification.doula_profile.tsx: 7 lines - imports ProviderProfile + DOULA_CONFIG, renders ProviderProfile
thin_wrapper_verification.midwife_profile.tsx: 7 lines - imports ProviderProfile + MIDWIFE_CONFIG, renders ProviderProfile
